We're a longevity company — a personalized protocol built around your biology, and measured by results.

What makes us different

Four things you won't get buying treatments online.

Every patient is measured, prescribed for individually, guided continuously, and tracked over time. The combination is the difference.

Biomarker-first care

We test before we treat. A baseline blood panel sets each patient's starting point and shapes a protocol built for their physiology — then re-testing measures real change.

Personalized protocols

Physician-supervised, individualized plans — never one-size-fits-all. Selected because the labs say it's right, not because it's on a menu.

An AI companion

An always-on, data-connected guide through the journey — dosing, adherence, side effects, and progress against goals, day to day.

Tracked outcomes

Biomarkers retested every 90 days, with wearables and reported results in one place — so care adjusts to what's actually working.

What we treat

Six clinical protocols. One platform.

Start with any protocol and add others over time — all on the same biomarker-driven, physician-supervised platform.

Vantage exclusive · First to market

The GLP-1 Off-Ramp Protocol — the first of its kind.

Millions start GLP-1s. Almost no one tells them how to stop. We built the first systematic clinical protocol for the transition off GLP-1s — the category-defining offering no competitor has.

6M+
Americans currently on GLP-1 medications
~2 in 3
regain the weight within a year of stopping
The first
systematic clinical off-ramp protocol — no competitor offers one
Our answer
  • A structured, physician-managed GLP-1 taper
  • Muscle-preserving peptides to protect lean mass
  • Biomarker tracking through the entire transition
  • A maintenance plan built so results actually last

No one else has built a systematic clinical protocol for coming off GLP-1s. Vantage is the first.

How it works

From baseline to optimized — in four steps.

A connected, physician-supervised journey. No guesswork, no dead ends.

STEP 01

Measure

A baseline biomarker panel — at-home kit or service center.

STEP 02

Plan

A physician reads your labs and builds an individualized protocol.

STEP 03

Treat

Medications ship direct; the AI companion guides each day.

STEP 04

Refine

Retest at 90 days — biomarkers move and the protocol adjusts.

The centerpiece

An AI companion that connects every signal.

It unifies biomarkers, wearables, medications, and daily check-ins into one intelligent guide — so patients never have to interpret their own data or wonder what's next.

  • Connects lab biomarkers, wearable data, and protocol progress in one view
  • Explains results in plain language and answers questions in real time
  • Nudges adherence and surfaces trends before they become problems
  • Escalates to licensed physicians whenever care decisions are needed
Vantage companion

Pharmacy & purity

Every vial, verified — scan it yourself.

We don't ask you to trust what's in the vial. We prove it. Every prescription is compounded by a named, licensed 503A pharmacy and ships with a Certificate of Analysis you can scan.

Certificate of Analysis on every vial

A QR code on each vial links to its batch report — no guessing what you're injecting.

Potency verified

Every batch is assayed so your dose is exactly what the label says.

Sterility & endotoxin tested

Compounded under USP <797>/<800> standards and tested before release.

Cold-chain integrity

Temperature-monitored shipping, direct to your door.

100% batch-tested USP <797> / <800> Named 503A partners COA QR on every vial
Measured, not guessed

Biomarkers are the spine of every plan.

We don't prescribe into a vacuum. A 71+ biomarker panel sets the baseline, drives the protocol, and proves whether it's working through 90-day re-testing.
